transcript: Hey, everybody! How’s it goin’? Woo! I’m happy to be with you guys tonight. Thank you for being here. I sure do appreciate it! Thank you very much. We’re gonna, uh… have a little fun. Thank you kindly. So, let’s—

Thank you for calling Sensually Yours. How can I help you?
Uh… doin’ well. How can I help you?
Yeah. Um… what kinda store is this?
Sensually Yours is a… adult novelty store.
Okay! Uh… is your store organized?
Okay. And, uh, the staff members, are you eager to help?
Y—yes? If I [sic] have any questions when you come in, yes, we can help you.
Um… do you have wands… in stock?—
We receive them straight from the manufacturer and they go to the sales floor, so, yes, they are.
Oh, so you don’t rent them?

Well— somehow… as the son of God holding me![ Wayne Bent sample ]I treated these two naked Witnesses with the same respect as if I’d been an MD who was doing surgery.

[sample of Wayne Bent disciple]This means literally, physically naked.
So if anybody’s got somethin’, ya know, I’m happy to talk to you here tonight. Certainly am! Oh, I certainly am! [delay]What’s on tap? What’s onn tap?!

We’ve got, uh, someone coming up right now.
Hey, how’s it goin’? Big fan. Uh, I have a question about—

You know the guy I’m talking about? That guy?—
Uh… yeah, hi. What store is this?
Oh, yeah? Hey, man. Uh, you guys got any upchuck up 'ere?
Yeah, David Donnaruma, you’re talking about. "The Interloper", I think. He… would come into my work and pester the hell—
Hey, I was lookin’ for some upchuck up 'ere.

And anyway, he didn’t belong there. He just came in and harassed me and I, uh— Ya know, it was a business transaction he was tryin’ to do without paying, so I did have his number in a hotel. And, uh… there ya go!And then after I left that job, it occurred to me one day, You know what? If I call the voicemail, I bet you he’s in there. So I logged into my old company’s voicemail and sure enough her was in there with a new hotel number. And I… called him again! Placed takeout orders all over the world.
Yeah, d’you guys have any upchuck up 'ere?
Well, it’s… well, regurgitation is what it is.
Yeah, I got some. Come on down, I’ll—I’ll serve it up to ya.—
From a— From a hog? From a pig? I mean, it’s for a recipe.—
So you guys sell ur—urine and… blood? Things like that? Can I get that from you?—
Okay, uh… d’you have any semen up 'ere? [delay]At all?
Uh… w—? Yeah, how much am I lookin’ for for like a half a gallon, gallon?
Are you gonna make eye contact or not?
"Eye contact"… Well I’m— I’m willing to pay cash or… Master Chārge.—
Cool! So yeah, I mean, uh… we’d cut you a deal if we make eye contact while we deliver the semen.
Uh-huh. Well if you’re tryin’ to be cute— I mean, this is a serious recipe I’m tryin’ to cook, guy! And that’s what it calls for. [sniffs]
Uh… doesn’t have a name but it looks real good in the picture.
It’s— It’s an over 21 magazine. Okay?
Well we’re all of age here, so yeah, you wanna come down and collect all these bodily fluids, we got you.

So yeah, I think he’s no longer with us but, uh… it was fun while it lasted.
Anyone else have any, uh, numbers, questions?—
[ Wayne Bent samples ]Yes. Yes.Yes. Yes.I swear it!

Well, we prefer lips but no teeth.

[delay]What can I expect to get, up—
What can I expect? Ya know, how late are ya there, is what I’m tryin’ to find out.—
Like I said, Lips, no teeth.
[delay]What can I expect? Ya know, how late are ya there, is what I’m tryin’ to find out.

I think Sack ’N Save would be your best bet for blood—a little local grocery store. We’re not gettin’ any local right now.

From a cow… or from a pig?
You might be able to get a whole pig at Costco.
Yeah, I looked. They had heads but… I just need the lips.

You gotta get the whole kit and caboodle.

His name’s Diego. He works at a wine store.

Oh, yeah! Yeah, I think— Might have seen ya. Might have seen ya once or twice.

Would you be willin’ to apply a little mousse into my scalp? [exhales] Into my hair shaft? Work it in there, you know what I’m saying, guy?
[sharp inhale] Uh… You with me on that or…?

You guys, thank you—on a serious note—thank you so, so much for being here tonight. I… can’t believe it. It’s— Thank you, you guys rule! Seriously. Thank you.
